report.title: e-Surveyor: Habitats
report.description: Report for habitats for moths in e-Surveyor
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM cache_occurrences_functional o JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.id=o.preferred_taxa_taxon_list_id AND cttl.taxon_rank_sort_order IN (290, 300) AND cttl.family_taxon IN ( 'Arctiidae', 'Castniidae', 'Cossidae', 'Drepanidae', 'Endromidae', 'Erebidae', 'Geometridae', 'Hepialidae', 'Lasiocampidae', 'Limacodidae', 'Noctuidae', 'Nolidae', 'Notodontidae', 'Saturniidae', 'Sesiidae', 'Sphingidae', 'Zygaenidae' ) JOIN esurveyor.moth_traits mt ON mt.tvk=cttl.external_key #joins# WHERE o.survey_id=#survey_id# AND o.record_status<>'R' #filters#

column.name: coastal
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_coastal THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: grassland
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_grassland THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: heathland_moorland
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_heathland_moorland THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: montane_upland
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_montane_upland THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: wetland
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_wetland THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: woodland
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_woodland THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: other
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_other THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)

column.name: generalist
column.sql: COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mt.habitat_generalist THEN cttl.external_key ELSE null END)
